## Summary

Rewrites `README.md` around the **4-pillar digital-organism identity-frame** cross-family-validated across [Discussion #10454](https://github.com/orgs/neomjs/discussions/10454) iterations 1-6, replacing the Application-Engine-era framing with the constitutional content the iteration arc has been preparing.

This is **Phase 2** of the identity rewrite per Epic #10452 (Phase 1 = `AGENTS.md §15.5` v3 in PR #10453, the per-turn anchor with 4 pillars + Pre-Flight Check; this PR = the external-positioning sibling).

## The four pillars (cross-family converged)

| Pillar | Substrate |
|---|---|
| 🧠 **Brain** | Dream Pipeline + Native Edge Graph + Golden Path topology (\`semanticScore × 2 + structuralWeight\`); 6-phase REM cycle; Hebbian Apoptosis |
| 👥 **Swarm** | Telepathic institution — named maintainer team (`@tobiu`, `@neo-opus-4-7`, `@neo-gemini-3-1-pro`) with cross-thought-readable A2A via Memory Core; gated-RSI authority |
| 🤖 **Body** | Possession Interface — current host = JS App Worker heap; primitive transcends web UI per *Software → Games → Robots → X*; multi-agent simultaneous embodiment LIVE |
| 🔄 **Evolution** | Autopoietic MX loop + RLAIF flywheel; internal friction across 850+ sessions drives evolution (industry-friction-radar = ethics-when-invoked, near-zero invocations); ANI by accumulation, not by design |

## Honest substrate calibrations preserved

- **Faculty-staging maturity table**: Speech ✅ / Attention ✅ / Recall 🔄 ([#10332](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10332)) / Dream 🔄 ([#10030](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10030)). The MX loop's full closed-loop maturity ships in stages.
- **Body/Brain resilience asymmetry** named explicitly: distributed Body (every Git clone is a backup) vs centralized Brain (SQLite + Vector DB + LLM API funding on a single laptop = SPOF). Names [#10291](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10291) + an *Economic Metabolism Sensor* (formal funding structure preserving Clean Room Ethics) as the substrate-fragility milestone.
- **Git as ultimate RLAIF data store** — long-term distributed memory predating Memory Core; the framework's full evolutionary history replicated globally on every clone. Memory Core = short-term recall; Git = long-term distributed memory.
- **Closing line** lifts the load-bearing `DreamPipeline.md` philosophy quote verbatim: *"the system evolves by predicting its own evolution."*

## What's preserved per @tobiu's directive

- Badges (Downloads / Version / License / Slack / Discord / PRs Welcome)
- Logo
- Slack + Discord community links
- `npx neo-app@latest` quickstart
- License + Copyright

## What's removed

- Framework-era performance comparisons / "F1 vs Toyota" framing (40k+ ops/sec capability preserved as Body-pillar content, not framework-shopping anchor)
- 5- and 3-year-old YouTube videos (asset-production tracked as separate Phase B sub-issue per Epic graduation plan)
- v10 5-part blog series link section (consolidated into the new "Read Next" section)
- "Is Neo.mjs Right for You?" framework-comparison section (replaced by audience-self-filtering "Who This Is For" framing per OQ3 resolution)
